ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  AKI India Limited has undergone a significant board restructure, appointing three new independent directors with diverse expertise (entrepreneurship, legal/finance, leather technology) and reconstituting its Audit and Nomination & Remuneration Committees to comprise solely independent members, which enhances corporate governance. However, the simultaneous appointment of Ms. Naba Fatima as a non-independent director, who is the sister of the Managing Director and another board member, raises a red flag regarding potential familial influence on the board.
